title: Job Opening Teacher at MT Educare

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at MT Educare
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at MT Educare. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About MT Educare:
MT Educare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MT Educare!
